PYACS 0.66.20
  • pyacs.lib.astrotime.datetime2dayno

pyacs.lib.astrotime.datetime2dayno

pyacs.lib.astrotime.datetime2dayno(datetime)[source]

Convert Python datetime to day of year, year, and day fraction.

Parameters:

datetime (datetime or array-like) – Datetime instance(s).

Returns:

  • year (int or ndarray) – Year.

  • dayno (int or ndarray) – Day of year.

  • ut (float or ndarray) – Day fraction.
